title: Add belief digests, reflection scoring and security eval
objective: Compile low-token accepted-belief digests during off-peak reflection and add tests for poisoning, trust gates and local-model budget safety.
requirements: Compile bounded personal/org belief digests from accepted beliefs only.
Score reflection candidates by frequency, freshness, authority, cross-user relevance and contradiction risk.
Cache extraction/digest results by content hash and extractor version.
acceptance_checks: Digest excludes candidate_only and contested content.
Poisoned untrusted source cannot enter digest or normal context.
memory_eval reports trust-gate and prompt-injection cases.
Reflection can run in deterministic-only mode.
